feed.title: 7amthereaper
feed.subtitle: a Cybersecurity major student, Reverse Engineer and Malware Analyst who's Interested in low-level stuff/programming and how things work under the hood..

entry.title: Brbbot: Full Malware analysis
entry.summary: Brbbot functions as a trojan or bot, it can also be used as a backdoor. sample hash: f9227a44ea25a7ee8148e2d0532b14bb640f6dc52cb5b22a9f4fa7fa037417fa Quick triage frisking strings was pretty useful, it gave me a pretty good idea about how the malware would behave. a lot of network-related strings. these encode ,sleep ,exit ,conf ,file ,exec. we will find out later that they’re the bot cmds. ...

entry.title: XWorm RAT: Full Malware Analysis & Behavioral Breakdown

link.title: XWorm RAT: Full Malware Analysis & Behavioral Breakdown

entry.summary: XWorm RAT XWorm is a MaaS multifunctional RAT that was first discovered in 2022 with a wide range of capabilities. sample hash: e4c179fa5bc03b07e64e65087afcbad04d40475204ebb0a0bc7d77f071222656 malware bazzar: bazaar.abuse.ch/sample/e4c179fa5bc03b07e64e65087afcbad04d40475204ebb0a0bc7d77f071222656 XWorm infection chain Static analysis this PowerShell script was sort of interesting, if we ...
